title: Create: Tank Additions
description: this is Create: Tank Additions. a mod that adds tank and other vehicle relafeatures to Create and valkyrien skies.
body:
**CTA (Create Tank Additions)** is a Minecraft Forge mod for 1.20.1 that adds missiles, bombs, and tactical weaponry with integration for Create Big Cannons (CBC) and Valkyrien Skies (VS).



- **Key Features:**
  - VS ship integration for missiles (tracks position/rotation with moving ships so missiles always move with the ship)
  - CBC fuse system for missiles (right-click with CBC fuse to apply)
  - Chunk loading during missile flight
  - Wrench rotation for missiles and scopes (Create wrench)
  - Ship velocity inheritance on launch for missiles
  - CC by wire (allows you to connect CC: tweaked computers to peripherals wirelesly using the wireless connector)

### Missiles (9 types × 3 warheads = 27 items)
Each missile has HE, HEAT, and HEFRAG variants:
- 3M-54 Kalibr (Cruise Missile)
- AGM-88 HARM
- AIM-9 Sidewinder
- APKWS (Guided Rocket)
- Hellfire
- Hydra-70 (Unguided Rocket)
- Katyusha (Unguided Rocket)
- R-77 (Active Radar Homing)
- TOW-2 (Wire-Guided)



### Bombs (6 types × 3 warheads = 18 items)
Each bomb has HE, HEAT, and HEFRAG variants:
- CBU-87 (Cluster Bomb)
- GBU-12 (Laser Guided)
- GBU-24 (Laser Guided, Heavy)
- M64 (General Purpose) - HE only
- Rockeye (Cluster Bomb)
- Snakeye (Retarded Bomb)

## Dependencies
- **Forge**
- **Create**
- **Valkyrien Skies**
- Thermodynamica
